## Relevant prompt/input

If the report is about agent output: the model, the runtime (Claude / Codex / OpenClaw / ChatGPT), the SKILL.md variant used, and the full user prompt (or enough of it to reproduce).

If the report is about a validator or CI failure: the exact command and its output.
